summary: The matrix has at most nine cells and therefore at most 512 states, which is too small for an honest runtime scaling verdict.

workload_bound.source_constraint: m and n are each between 1 and 3 inclusive

replacement_checks.evidence: Breadth-first search visits each of at most 2^k masks once and tries exactly k precomputed flip masks at each visited state.
Regression checks every binary state for every legal matrix shape against an independent exhaustive enumeration of all flip subsets.
